title: Travel — Houston / Kentucky / Idaho / DC / Jordan-Israel-Egypt log
html:
TL;DR

  • Compact trip-log of 5 trips in early 2023: Houston (lost a flight, lost $99 on carry-on, then a kind agent let him through), Kentucky (Jay drove him to Eugene, watched UFC at a "dirt ass Chinese restaurant," Jipp broke a camera), Idaho (last-minute pickup of Andrew, surprised Riley, in-and-out 2 days), DC (clutched public-transit to the hostel, woke up with bug bites), and jordan/israel/egypt (deferred to journal entry).
  • Specimen of his trip-log form: each location gets 2-4 bullets, each bullet = a memorable mishap or lesson. Same template he uses in 2024 08 14 travel occurrences.
  • Names dropped: Jay, Jipp, Riley, Andrew, Lalo. The Grants Pass crew on tour.
  • The 2023 Mid-East trip is referred to cryptically — "refer to journal entry" — meaning there's a separate document we may want to surface (likely 2023 09 06 untitled which is the actual Egypt/Jordan log).

Key quotes

"missed first flight because of change to gate / tried to finesse carryon, got fucked for $99, then lovely lady let me go thru no charge / learned: can't finesse carryon policy"

"couldn't find a place to watch UFC fights so went to a dirt ass Chinese restaurant"

"Jordan/Israel/Egypt - refer to journal entry"

Why it matters in the graph

  • Documents 5 trips in one note — useful indexing artifact. Each trip is a mini-story.
  • "Jipp broke camera" — Jipp (Cam Jipp's nickname pattern, or maybe Cam's brother) keeps appearing across notes, both as travel partner (2024 07 04 questions) and gift-recipient.
  • The "refer to journal entry" line is a trail-marker pointing to 2023 09 06 untitled (the actual Mid-East log).
  • Confirms Andrew, Riley as members of the home crew.

Open questions

  • Who is Jipp exactly? Cam's brother? Cam himself? (Cam = Cam Jipp suggests one person.)
  • Where's the Mid-East journal entry actually stored? In Apple Notes (2023 09 06 untitled) or Google Docs?

Wikilinks
